news.t: Travel Through Trauma Redefines Healing Through Exploration

overview.description: The ProShares UltraPro Short 20+ Year Treasury (TTT) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the US Treasury 20+ Year index. The fund provides 3x inverse exposure, reset daily, to a market-value-weighted index that tracks the performance of US Treasury securities with remaining maturities greater than 20 years. TTT was launched on Mar 27, 2012 and is issued by ProShares.

data.title: Travel Through Trauma Redefines Healing Through Exploration
data.text: LOS ANGELES--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TTT #BreakTheCycle--Travel Through Trauma launches a holistic program empowering underprivileged young adults to heal from trauma through solo travel and vital suppor...
